CustomField.description: Overrides the org-level Donation Date Range for this batch. Defines the date range window (in days) used during donation matching. The process finds Opportunities or Payments within this range and selects the closest match. A value of 0 requires an exact date match.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the number of days from the Donation Date to search for matching Opportunities or Payments. Use 0 for exact date matching only.
CustomField.label: Number of Days from Donation Date
